calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Apr-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vivian Lu for and with Janice Cheung (Petitioner).

Ms. Lu explained that the title company insist that they obtain a Court order from this Court to confirm that the Decedent owned 50% of the property, that Family Court already decided this and that the property was sold in 2012. The Court stated that Family Court needs to address this issue. Ms. Lu also stated that the underwriter stated that the Special Letters expired and that they will not accept it, and that the $20,000.00 commission all goes to the Realtor.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
